requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 as International Baseline for Paraguay BESS Project Acceptance via INTN Conformity
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619通过INTN合格评定作为巴拉圭BESS项目验收的国际基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619通過INTN合格評定作為巴拉圭BESS項目驗收的國際基準

summary.en: Paraguay does not currently have a confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation or a dedicated national BESS technical regulation. INTN (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología) is the national standardisation body responsible for developing and maintaining Paraguay's national standards (NP norms). INTN adopts IEC international standards by reference as NP norms and operates a conformity assessment system. ANDE (the state electricity utility and de-facto sector authority) may reference INTN-adopted IEC standards in project technical specifications and connection agreement requirements. IEC 62619:2022 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules. IEC 62933-5-1:2024 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation) is the expected system-level complement. Exporters should verify the current INTN regulated-product scope and any mandatory conformity assessment obligations directly with INTN before shipment.
summary.zh: 巴拉圭目前尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规，与欧盟《电池法规》或专用国家BESS技术法规相当。INTN（国家技术、标准化和计量研究所）是负责制定和维护巴拉圭国家标准（NP规范）的国家标准化机构。INTN以NP规范引用采纳IEC国际标准，并运营合格评定体系。ANDE（国家电力企业兼实际行业主管机关）可能在项目技术规格和并网协议要求中引用INTN采纳的IEC标准。IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准。IEC 62933-5-1:2024（电化学储能系统——安全考量——危害识别、风险评估和风险缓解）是预期的系统级补充标准。出口商在出货前应直接向INTN核实现行受监管产品范围及任何强制合格评定义务。
summary.zht: 巴拉圭目前尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規，與歐盟《電池法規》或專用國家BESS技術法規相當。INTN（國家技術、標準化和計量研究所）是負責制定和維護巴拉圭國家標準（NP規範）的國家標準化機構。INTN以NP規範引用採納IEC國際標準，並運營合格評定體系。ANDE（國家電力企業兼實際行業主管機關）可能在項目技術規格和併網協議要求中引用INTN採納的IEC標準。IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準。IEC 62933-5-1:2024（電化學儲能系統——安全考量——危害識別、風險評估和風險緩解）是預期的系統級補充標準。出口商在出貨前應直接向INTN核實現行受監管產品範圍及任何強制合格評定義務。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in Paraguay project specifications, adopted by reference as INTN NP norm)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard referenced in project specifications)

INTN (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología) — Paraguay national standardisation body; conformity assessment via INTN NP norm adoption of IEC standards; verify current regulated product scope directly with INTN

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in Paraguay project specifications or INTN conformity assessment. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被巴拉圭项目规格或INTN合格评定接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被巴拉圭項目規格或INTN合格評定接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: Paraguay project owners and ANDE connection agreements reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. INTN conformity assessment adopts IEC standards by reference as NP norms, and IEC 62619 is the internationally expected baseline. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications or INTN conformity assessment. Exporters should: (a) verify the current INTN regulated-product list for any mandatory pre-shipment conformity assessment obligation; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to Paraguay BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition and any NP norm version referenced in the project specification, ANDE connection agreement, or INTN conformity scope before committing to a test programme.
gap.zh: 关键差距：巴拉圭项目业主和ANDE并网协议将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。INTN合格评定以NP规范引用采纳IEC标准，IEC 62619是国际预期基准。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格或INTN合格评定接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实现行INTN受监管产品清单，确认是否存在强制装运前合格评定义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至巴拉圭BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格、ANDE并网协议或INTN合格评定范围中引用的IEC 62619版本及任何NP规范版本。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：巴拉圭項目業主和ANDE併網協議將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。INTN合格評定以NP規範引用採納IEC標準，IEC 62619是國際預期基準。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格或INTN合格評定接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實現行INTN受監管產品清單，確認是否存在強制裝運前合格評定義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至巴拉圭BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格、ANDE併網協議或INTN合格評定範圍中引用的IEC 62619版本及任何NP規範版本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where ANDE or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; INTN mandatory conformity assessment obligation for BESS specifically has not been confirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with INTN
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: INTN (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología) — Paraguay national standardisation body

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety regulation has been identified for Paraguay as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in Paraguay project specifications and ANDE connection agreements, adopted by reference through INTN NP norm adoption of IEC standards. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for Paraguay project acceptance. Verify INTN current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, ANDE, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，巴拉圭尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全法规；然而，IEC 62619是巴拉圭项目规格和ANDE并网协议中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准，通过INTN以NP规范引用采纳IEC标准的方式纳入。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足巴拉圭项目验收要求。出货前请核实INTN现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主、ANDE及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，巴拉圭尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全法規；然而，IEC 62619是巴拉圭項目規格和ANDE併網協議中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準，通過INTN以NP規範引用採納IEC標準的方式納入。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足巴拉圭項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實INTN現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主、ANDE及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
